narrative:
Precinct Harrison D (precinct in Scioto County) has 390 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a clear Republican lean of 6.9 percentage points.
